name: 赐福
description: 所有友方棋子下一次造成伤害时，伤害增加4点
code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction === sourcePiece.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); allies.forEach(function(ally) { if (typeof addStatusEffectById === 'function') { addStatusEffectById(ally.instanceId, { id: 'divine-blessing-buff', type: 'divine-blessing-buff', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: 1, intensity: 4, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-divine-blessing'] }); } if (typeof addRuleById === 'function') { addRuleById(ally.instanceId, 'rule-divine-blessing'); } }); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '为所有友方棋子赐福，下一次伤害增加4点', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '所有友方棋子下一次造成伤害时，伤害增加4点', expectedValues: { damageBonus: 4 } }; }
